mapper.select: SELECT POSTING_ID, COMPANY_NAME, TO_CHAR(POSTED_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS POSTED_DATE, TO_CHAR(DEADLINE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DEADLINE, REGION, EMPLOYMENT_TYPE, EDUCATION, JOB_POSITION, TECH_STACK, SALARY, POSTING_URL FROM JOB_POSTING ORDER BY POSTING_ID DESC
SELECT DISTINCT COMPANY_NAME FROM JOB_POSTING ORDER BY COMPANY_NAME

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY jp.POSTED_DATE DESC, jp.POSTING_ID DESC) AS RN, jp.POSTING_ID, jp.COMPANY_NAME, TO_CHAR(jp.POSTED_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS POSTED_DATE, TO_CHAR(jp.DEADLINE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DEADLINE, jp.REGION, jp.EMPLOYMENT_TYPE, jp.EDUCATION, jp.JOB_POSITION, jp.TECH_STACK, jp.SALARY, jp.POSTING_URL FROM JOB_POSTING jp INNER JOIN JOB_POSTING_CATEGORY jpc ON jp.POSTING_ID = jpc.POSTING_ID WHERE jpc.CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId} ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}
